form.formComment: Was out of placings last time when fourth (26.30) at Geelong in a Restricted WIN H. Will jump from box 1 for the first time. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at Horsham when a 0.8 lengths second but did run a powerful 23.13 over the 410m journey. Rates on top here on the time from last run.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (21.72) at Shepparton over 390m. Racing well and can find winning form again.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last on March 31 over 485m at Horsham behind Doongalla Rocket beaten 6 lengths (27.57) in a Grade 4/5. Placed two back at Horsham. Ignore last start. Has ability and can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (25.36) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 4 length third. Has performed well off the draw with a win and six places from 12 starts. Makes strong appeal.
